calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jul-07-2010 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 9:31am
Judge Pro Tem Al Anolik, clerk-Leslie Gomez, nothing on record, dept. 525.
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Appellant does not appear. Respondent appears in pro per.
Parties, previously sworn, testify in the narrative and respond to questions from Judge Anolik.

9:36
Judge requests Respondent to calculate interest earned and submit it to him in writing prior to leaving the courtroom.
Matter is submitted.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar May-03-2010 Judgment Entered

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
